metadata.assessed_by: AWS Transform Custom — Agentic Readiness Assessment
metadata.archetype_justification: Frontend-only SPA serving as an admin dashboard template. No backend server, no database, no persistent state, no write operations. All data is mocked in-memory.
metadata.dev_library_application_rationale: repo_type is application, service_archetype is stateless-utility, and all 5 surface flags are false. Per Step 1.5, the library N/A mapping is applied.

readiness_profile.deployment_gate: Cleared for autonomous operation. Instrument observability. Define scope explicitly. Run controlled pilot first.
readiness_profile.rationale: This is a frontend-only Angular admin dashboard template with no backend services, no API surface, no persistent data, and no authentication enforcement. All 5 surface flags are false. The dev-library-application override applies, making the vast majority of ARA questions N/A. The 5 questions that remain applicable (ENG-Q1 through ENG-Q5) all resolve to INFO.

findings.title: No IaC governance for deployment infrastructure
findings.description: No HTTP/RPC surface and no auth surface detected. This is a frontend-only Angular template deployed via rsync to a remote server. No IaC (Terraform, CDK, CloudFormation) defines the deployment infrastructure.
findings.gap: No IaC governance for deployment infrastructure. Deployment is ad-hoc rsync without peer review or drift detection.
findings.recommendation: If deploying to production, define hosting infrastructure (S3+CloudFront, or containerized) as IaC. For template consumers, this is informational.

findings.title: No API contract testing (not applicable)
findings.description: No HTTP/RPC surface — API contract testing is not applicable. CI/CD exists (GitHub Actions and legacy Travis CI) but performs build and lint only. No API contracts exist to test.
findings.gap: No API contract testing (not applicable for frontend template).
findings.recommendation: No action required for current scope. If a backend API is added, introduce contract testing.

findings.title: No rollback mechanism for demo deployment
findings.description: No deployed HTTP/RPC surface — deployment rollback is a consumer concern. The demo deployment uses rsync without rollback capability. No blue/green, canary, or feature-flag patterns are present.
findings.gap: No rollback mechanism for demo deployment (not applicable for frontend template consumed via npm/git).
findings.recommendation: If deploying to production, adopt CloudFront distribution with versioned S3 origins or container-based blue/green.

findings.title: No test files despite configured test infrastructure
findings.description: No HTTP/RPC surface — no APIs exist to test. Test infrastructure is configured (karma.conf.js, protractor.conf.js, tsconfig.spec.json) but no actual test spec files (*.spec.ts) are present in the source tree.
findings.gap: Complete absence of test files despite configured test infrastructure.
findings.recommendation: Add unit tests for Angular components and services. Migrate from deprecated Protractor to Cypress or Playwright for E2E testing.

findings.title: No persistent data store — encryption at rest not applicable
findings.description: No persistent data store exists. All data in this application is mocked in-memory via the src/app/@core/mock/ services. There is no database, no S3 bucket, no file storage defined.
findings.gap: No data at rest to encrypt.
findings.recommendation: No action required for current scope. Template consumers who add a backend data store should ensure KMS encryption at rest.
